name: Redemption — C: Declined Work Re-market (30/60/90 days)

nodes.name: Filter: Who Gets a Text Today?

parameters.message: ={{ (() => { const name = $json.Name.split(' ')[0]; const day = $json.sendDay; if (day === 30) return 'Hey ' + name + '! This is Redemption Collision Center. Checking back on that estimate — still need the repair done? We offer financing up to $5,000 and free estimates. (346) 471-5322'; if (day === 60) return 'Hi ' + name + ', Redemption Collision here. Your repair estimate is still on file. Ready when you are — call/text (346) 471-5322 or book at REPLACE_WITH_CAL_LINK'; return 'Last check-in from Redemption Collision, ' + name + '. We\'d love to help you get that repair done. Financing available. (346) 471-5322 — reply STOP to opt out.'; })() }}

main.node: Filter: Who Gets a Text Today?

_setup_notes.sheet_structure: Create a Google Sheet named 'DeclinedEstimates' with columns: Name | Phone | Service | DeclineDate | Sent30 | Sent60 | Sent90
_setup_notes.sheet_defaults: Sent30/60/90 default value = FALSE. DeclineDate format = YYYY-MM-DD
_setup_notes.step1: Create Google Sheet → share with your Google Sheets service account email in n8n
_setup_notes.step2: Replace REPLACE_WITH_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with the Sheet ID from the URL
_setup_notes.step3: Replace REPLACE_WITH_GSHEETS_CRED_ID after setting up Google Sheets OAuth in n8n
_setup_notes.usage: When a customer declines an estimate, add their row to the sheet. The workflow handles the rest.
